description: After escaping S.H.I.E.L.D. custody by reconstituting, Shockley calls Ivanov from a motel to confess that he is now an Inhuman and was the source of the explosion. Ivanov is unyielding, but Shockley pledges to continue his war against Inhumans and sets out to trap S.H.I.E.L.D. for Ivanov.

transcript.line: I have a confession to make. You won't want to hear it any more than I want to say it, but I have to.
Mr. Shockley. And how did you escape S.H.I.E.L.D. custody?
The Terrigen. It didn't turn Nadeer into one of those monsters. It made me one. I caused the explosion.
You're Inhuman. There's no confession that can absolve you of this.
I am a soldier. In a war to protect humanity. I can still be that soldier.
The plan hasn't changed. I will deliver S.H.I.E.L.D. to you.
Anything else I can do for you?
